segments.text: Behold, I send My messenger, And he will prepare the way before Me. And the Lord, whom you seek, Will suddenly come to His temple, Even the Messenger of the covenant, In whom you delight. Behold, He is coming.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: But who can endure the day of His coming? And who can stand when He appears? For He is like a refiner's fire And like launderers' soap.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He will sit as a refiner and a purifier of silver;
He will purify the sons of Levi, And purge them as gold and silver, That they may offer to the Lord An offering in righteousness.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Then the offering of Judah and Jerusalem Will be pleasant to the Lord, As in the days of old, As in former years.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: And I will come near you for judgment; I will be a swift witness Against sorcerers, Against adulterers, Against perjurers, Against those who exploit wage earners and widows and orphans, And against those who turn away an alien— Because they do not fear Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: For I am the Lord, I do not change; Therefore you are not consumed, O sons of Jacob.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Yet from the days of your fathers You have gone away from My ordinances And have not kept them.
Return to Me, and I will return to you.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: In what way shall we return?
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: Will a man rob God? Yet you have robbed Me!
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: In what way have we robbed You?
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: In tithes and offerings.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: You are cursed with a curse, For you have robbed Me, Even this whole nation.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Bring all the tithes into the storehouse, That there may be food in My house, And try Me now in this. If I will not open for you the windows of heaven And pour out for you such blessing That there will not be room enough to receive it.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: And I will rebuke the devourer for your sakes, So that he will not destroy the fruit of your ground, Nor shall the vine fail to bear fruit for you in the field.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: And all nations will call you blessed, For you will be a delightful land.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: Your words have been harsh against Me.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: What have we spoken against You?
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: It is useless to serve God; What profit is it that we have kept His ordinance, And that we have walked as mourners Before the Lord of hosts?
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: So now we call the proud blessed, For those who do wickedness are raised up; They even tempt God and go free.
segments.speaker: People

segments.text: Then those who feared the Lord spoke to one another, And the Lord listened and heard them;
So a book of remembrance was written before Him For those who fear the Lord And who meditate on His name.
They shall be Mine on the day that I make them My jewels. And I will spare them As a man spares his own son who serves him.
segments.speaker: The Lord of hosts

segments.text: Then you shall again discern Between the righteous and the wicked, Between one who serves God And one who does not serve Him.
